summary: Iteration 5 — anti-screenshot / anti-copy deterrence hardening end-to-end verification. Backend: pytest 40/40 passing (37 original + 3 new security-header tests). All 7 security headers verified via curl on /api/health and /api/products. CORS preflight to /api/enquiries returns 204 (not broken). Frontend: shield toast + keyboard shortcuts (F12/Ctrl+S/P/U/Ctrl+Shift+I/PrintScreen) intercepted with polite toast (exact text match), toast fades after ~2.4s, right-click on [data-shield=on] blocks triggers toast, image drag preventDefault'd on /about, contact info (email/phone/address) userSelect:auto (selectable), textarea right-click NOT blocked on /contact, admin routes fully excluded (right-click + Ctrl+S both no-toast on /admin/dashboard). Meta http-equiv tags present in HTML (Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, CSP, format-detection). Certifications page has NABL cert slot + fallback text (6 'Certificate on record' items) since no cert images are wired yet. Brochure /brochure.pdf serves 2.98 MB application/pdf. TDS request dialog opens with emerald notice. WhatsApp/tel/mailto links correct. Mobile 375px viewport: no horizontal overflow, [data-shield=on] images have user-select:none. Site-wide branding: ZERO occurrences of ISO 22241, GPCB, 826010, Western India, Client 01, info@nilaynarayan.com, no-reply@nilaynarayan.com, or encoding artefacts across 8 pages. ISO 14001, JSPCB, 828109, TC-17291, NilayNarayan Polychem LLP, nilaynarayanpolychem@gmail.com, www.nnpolychem.com all present where expected. VERDICT: PASS.

verification_matrix.shield_toast_text_exact: Protected company material. Please request official documents via enquiry.
verification_matrix.watermark_nn_watermark_overlay_count: 0 (no cert images loaded yet; fallback path in use — matches spec)
verification_matrix.tds_dialog_download_notice_present: yes ('Download will begin automatically after you submit this form.' — rendered in uppercase via CSS text-transform, underlying source text matches)

site_wide_required_strings_hits.www.nnpolychem.com: present in footer on all pages

critical_code_review_comments: INFORMATIONAL (not a bug — matches spec): The `<meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="frame-ancestors 'none';">` in index.html emits a benign browser warning: 'The Content Security Policy directive frame-ancestors is ignored when delivered via a <meta> element.' Browsers only honour frame-ancestors when delivered via HTTP response header. For static-site clickjacking protection to actually apply to the frontend HTML, the CDN/nginx/edge serving `/index.html` must set the `Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors 'none'` and/or `X-Frame-Options: DENY` HTTP headers. The FastAPI middleware only covers responses served by uvicorn (i.e., /api/*). Consider adding these headers at the reverse proxy / hosting layer (Vercel/Netlify/CloudFront/Nginx) in deployment. Non-blocking for this iteration since the spec explicitly requested the meta tags and the API responses are hardened.
screenshotShield.js is idempotent-guarded (installed flag) and correctly excludes admin routes — good defensive design.

Note that `key.toLowerCase() === 'printscreen'` will only fire on browsers that expose `PrintScreen` as a KeyboardEvent.key (Chromium does; some Safari builds do not fire keydown for PrtSc at all). The current implementation is best-effort and honest about being a deterrent — matches the honest disclaimer comment in the file.
seed_data_creation: pytest suite creates + cleans up TEST_-prefixed enquiries and vendors via conftest.py session fixture. Sweep confirmed working (no residual TEST_ docs after run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All anti-screenshot/deterrence hardening features work end-to-end. Only informational finding: CSP frame-ancestors via <meta> is browser-ignored (spec explicitly asked for meta tags anyway, so not a bug). Backend HTTP-header CSP is applied on all /api/* responses. Consider adding the same headers at the edge/CDN for frontend static HTML in production deployment. All 40 pytest tests pass. All 17 UI/integration items in the review request verified via Playwright browser automation.
